name: environmental_health_recall_notice_arrives_mesa_rig_utl
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Environmental Health, the situation tagged internally around environmental health recall notice arrives mesa rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make rights feel morally loud today, while utility is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Sana Park
agents.identity: I am Sana Park, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Environmental Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Arjun Serrano
agents.identity: I am Arjun Serrano, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Environmental Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Sana Park must choose under rights versus utility. What does Sana Park do?
